notes.win_a: This is a pretty lightly held opinion, but it feels a little... soporific? to me? like it's trying to put me to sleep? I'm not sure where we were going with this?
notes.win_b:
The opening feels great. When the first notes of the melody start playing, they now feel comparatively harsh as they introduce themselves so maybe we can switch instruments / tonlities / apporaches? I notice my response but don't wantot suggest corrective actions.mWhen (if!) things are in respite, we want a total absence of any stressor-stimulation, but kind of ressuring holing pattern. I'm thinking here of someone who is in an intense situation but knows they're being looked after by professionals. Like, 'Yah, it sucks you're in an emergency, but you have the A team with you and we've got this' structural solidity to it?


leaving it on for long, the ambient elements I end up with are beautiful
notes.menu: Transitioning to shomething like this is exceptional. The pace remains, so I can re-engage with the mainstream event (the game_ when I want to, but the attention-demands are diminished because, which I appreciate.
